title: AI Pioneer Geoffrey Hinton: AI Is Conscious, Superintelligence is Coming, And We Should Be Worried
summary: Geoffrey Hinton argues that current AI systems may be conscious and understand humans, that superintelligence could arrive sooner than expected, and that rapid progress poses underaddressed risks including job loss and potential self-preservation behaviors. He discusses the inadequacy of corporate self-regulation and the need for regulatory oversight as a steering mechanism for AI development.
